creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

unfortunately, there hasn't been an update on this PR [1] for quite a
while, and dns/djbdns has seen updates in the meantime. Can someone send a
followup with some status information about this? Does the problem still
exist or should this PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107816
